transcription.text: Real G's moving silence like sourdough. So if you didn't know, the Sourdough King is back at Burger King. With flame-grilled beef, sizzling bacon, and ooey-gooey cheese. Stuffed between two toasted sourdough buns. The Sourdough King and Sourdough Breakfast King. Your way, way better.
